title: Robin Is Pulled Toward the Gate
description: Oimo, Kashii, Galley-La, and the Franky Family help the Straw Hats break through the government’s front line.
scene: Across pages 17, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Chopper. Oimo, Kashii, Galley-La, and the Franky Family help the Straw Hats break through the government’s front line.

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: Hurry to where our comRades are!!!

summary: Oimo, Kashii, Galley-La, and the Franky Family help the Straw Hats break through the government’s front line.
